webSearch.apiKey.label: Yandex Search API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Yandex Search API key. Fallback env vars: YANDEX_SEARCH_API_KEY or YC_API_KEY.

webSearch.iamToken.label: Yandex IAM Token
webSearch.iamToken.help: Optional IAM token instead of API key. Fallback env vars: YANDEX_IAM_TOKEN or YC_IAM_TOKEN.

webSearch.authMode.label: Auth Mode
webSearch.authMode.help: auto picks iamToken first, then apiKey. You can force api-key or iam.

webSearch.folderId.label: Yandex Folder ID
webSearch.folderId.help: Folder ID used by Search API requests. Can also come from YANDEX_FOLDER_ID or YC_FOLDER_ID.

webSearch.region.label: Default Region
webSearch.region.help: Optional Yandex region id for ranking bias.

webSearch.l10n.label: L10N
webSearch.l10n.help: Optional Yandex localization value passed as l10n.

webSearch.maxPassages.label: Max Passages
webSearch.maxPassages.help: How many Yandex passages to ask for before compacting snippets.

webSearch.userAgent.label: User Agent
webSearch.userAgent.help: Optional custom userAgent sent to Yandex.

webSearch.baseUrl.label: Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Optional override for the Yandex Search endpoint.

name: Yandex Search
description: Compact Yandex Search API provider for OpenClaw web search
